name: tidy-apply-review-fixes
default_program: [stages: preflight>detect>analyze>implement>verify>review>audit | scope: diff|repo|paths(glob,...) | policy: evidence,correctness-first,quality-gates{tests,compat,style},deterministic-output | lens: hickey-carmack | output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: TARGET_SCOPE
required_inputs.description: Bounded scope where the fixes may be applied.

required_inputs.name: REVIEW_FINDINGS
required_inputs.description: Cleanup findings to normalize and fix.

required_inputs.name: FUNCTIONAL_EQUIVALENCE
required_inputs.description: Explicit contract that behavior must stay the same.

required_inputs.name: APPLY_POLICY
required_inputs.description: How aggressively to apply the findings.
